kill_fact: No clean kill: the catalyst is genuine, live and binding. FDA accepted the Ziihera (zanidatamab) sBLA with Priority Review under RTOR, PDUFA target action date Aug 25, 2026 (~64d out, not yet fired), and the $250M Jazz milestone on US GEA approval is contractual and verified. BUT a load-bearing floor fact is FALSE: the dossier asserts 'no meaningful debt / ~$5.5/share hard NET cash.' As of March 2026 Zymeworks took on a $250M Royalty Pharma royalty-backed NOTE (long-term liabilities jumped $35.7M -> $278.977M; $2.1M Q1 interest). The $403.8M is GROSS cash, not net of this debt. The note is non-recourse and Zymeworks keeps the milestones (so the $250M Jazz cash and the no-equity-dilution conclusion survive), but it claws 30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties until Royalty Pharma is repaid 1.65-1.925x the note — so the 'approved-2L-BTC-franchise/royalty' component the $19 floor leans on is materially encumbered, not free. Setup remains a single FDA binary with real CRL/extension tail.
corrections: (1) 'No meaningful debt' is wrong: $250M non-recourse Royalty Pharma royalty-backed note executed March 2026; long-term liabilities $278.977M at 3/31/26 vs $35.7M at 12/31/25. (2) ~$5.5/share is GROSS cash per share, NOT net cash net-of-debt; true net-of-note cushion is far thinner. (3) The $19 floor's 'approved franchise + royalty' leg is encumbered — 30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties are diverted to repay the note (1.65x by 12/31/2033, 1.925x thereafter) before equity sees them. (4) Floor remains directionally defensible (non-recourse, milestones retained, funded beyond 2028, no equity ATM/going-concern), but should be treated as softer than 'hard cash-supported.'
evidence: Jazz Pharmaceuticals press release (PR Newswire / Jazz IR), 'FDA Acceptance and Priority Review of sBLA for Ziihera (zanidatamab-hrii) Combinations in First-Line HER2+ Locally Advanced or Metastatic GEA' — PDUFA target action date August 25, 2026; supported by Phase 3 HERIZON-GEA-01; reviewed under RTOR.

Zymeworks Q1 2026 results (GlobeNewswire 2026-05-07 / SEC 8-K Ex-99.1, CIK 0001937653): $403.8M cash+equivalents+marketable securities at 3/31/26 ($244.3M + $159.6M); ~73.0M shares 5/6/26; $95.8M of $125M buyback deployed (3,930,734 sh @ $24.37); $250.0M Jazz milestone on US GEA approval; resources fund operations beyond 2028 assuming $440M anticipated milestones.

Royalty Pharma press release, 'Royalty Pharma and Zymeworks Enter Into $250 Million Royalty-Backed Note Financing' (2026-03-02): $250M non-recourse note repaid from 30% of worldwide Ziihera royalties; payoff at 1.65x by 12/31/2033 or 1.925x thereafter; secured by the royalty streams.

Zymeworks Q1 2026 release balance sheet: long-term liabilities $278.977M at 3/31/26 vs $35.7M at 12/31/25, with $2.1M of interest expense in Q1 2026 — confirming the royalty-backed note is carried as debt and the 'no meaningful debt' claim is false.
